description_long: This sconce features a circular metal frame with a central cylindrical holder, likely designed to house a light source such as a bulb or candle. The frame is composed of a thin, sturdy metal ring with a horizontal support bar intersecting the circle and holding the cylindrical container in place. At the top of the circle, there is a small loop, suggesting it is intended for wall mounting or hanging. The overall design is minimalist and industrial, with clean lines and a matte black finish. The cylindrical holder appears to be made of metal and is proportionally smaller than the surrounding ring, creating a visually balanced composition. The sconce's open structure allows for light to disperse freely, making it suitable for both decorative and functional urban lighting.
description: A minimalist, circular metal sconce with a central cylindrical holder and a top mounting loop, finished in matte black. The open-frame design gives it an industrial and modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular frame, central cylindrical holder, and top mounting loop.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cylindrical holder and the thinness of the circular frame.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with the cylindrical holder and frame visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the depth of the holder and the linear profile of the frame.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a minimalist and industrial design, characterized by a simple circular frame and a central cylindrical holder. Its clean lines and matte black finish evoke a modern, utilitarian aesthetic.
